message:
refactor: improve error handling, observability, and type safety

Broad improvements across multiple modules:

src/cx/cx.rs:
- Improve spawn_region error handling and logging
- Better panic propagation in task joins

src/runtime/task_handle.rs:
- Enhanced JoinFuture abort reason tracking
- Add debug logging for task lifecycle events

src/observability/otel.rs:
- More robust OpenTelemetry shutdown handling
- Improved span attribute recording

src/service/service.rs:
- Simplify service lifecycle management
- Better shutdown coordination

src/sync/pool.rs:
- Pool capacity and allocation improvements
- Defensive bounds checking

src/tls/connector.rs:
- Enhanced TLS configuration validation
- Better error context for connection failures

src/net/tcp/stream.rs, src/trace/file.rs, src/types/budget.rs:
- Minor cleanups and type safety improvements

tests/repro_race_empty.rs:
- Test formatting cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
